steps.name: Flight Precheck
steps.instructions: Create feature branch. Verify workspace is clean.

steps.name: Context Preflight
steps.instructions: Run rivet context --intent code and save the contract to context.json. Review workflow recommendations, deterministic knowledge, and completeness before writing code.
steps.evidence: Context generated for phase-0.5-source-lift. Repo is fresh (1 prior PR merged); no source code yet. Phase 0.5 will lift the existing 133-tool monolith from <source-repo>/mcp/src/homelab_mcp/ into this repo with fresh git history (no filter-repo).

steps.name: Verify Contract
steps.instructions: Write MUST PASS, MUST FAIL, and Integration Points. Save to contract.md.
steps.evidence: contract.md authored: 9 MUST PASS (byte-identical lift, inventory parity, 102 tests, image build, 133 OpenAPI paths, license, source untouched, verify clean), 9 MUST FAIL (any byte drift, test regression, inventory drift, build fail, alien commits, source mods, missing artifacts, scope creep into CI/cluster, unverified claims). 12 integration points; explicit out-of-scope: CI/registry/cluster/source-mods/architecture-changes.

steps.name: Spec/PRD
steps.instructions: Write specification and design document with measurable acceptance criteria. Save to spec.md and design.md.
steps.evidence: spec.md (8 sections: summary, background, goals, non-goals, users, requirements R1-R7 + NF1-NF3 + C1-C4, risks RK-1..7, success criteria) and design.md (5 sections: architecture, procedure 2.1-2.5, leak-scan, out-of-scope, open questions Q1/Q2) authored. Phase 0.5 scope is narrow: byte-identical lift of mcp/ from source repo to new repo, no code changes, manifest with SHA-256 per file. RK-1 (homelab specifics in source) explicitly addressed by §3 leak-scan. C4 (license) explicitly authorizes MIT relicense for source operator's own code.

steps.name: Adversarial Spec
steps.instructions: Attack spec with AS-001..AS-008. Save findings to as-findings.json.
steps.evidence: AS-1..4 reviewed and applied: AS-1 leak-scan hard commit-gate, AS-2 third-party copyright check, AS-3 binary copy for text files, AS-4 G-5 lift-completeness gate. spec.md §8 reformatted with explicit MUST PASS / MUST FAIL headings (8 MP, 5 MF). Zero criticals; verdict PROCEED with edits.

steps.name: Implement
steps.instructions: HUMAN REVIEW GATE: Review the spec, contract, and adversarial findings before proceeding. Run 'rivet sdd step --approve' to begin implementation.
steps.evidence: Phase 0.5 Step 5 (Implement) executed successfully. Source homelab cleaned via Phase 0.4 (env-driven config, 127 tests pass, no homelab specifics in source). Lifted 17 files byte-faithfully via tools/lift_phase_0_5.py from source HEAD 5c25c3e9c7cd; SHA-256 manifest written to mcp/.lift-manifest.json. leak-scan.json: 0 blocking findings. validate_inventory (G-2): 133/29/104 verified. verify_lift.py (G-5): 133 tools, set equality with inventory. pytest in new repo location: 127 passed. Inventory re-pinned from 0727116 to 5c25c3e; inventory-history.json logs the change with empty tool name set diff. Source repo untouched by Phase 0.5 step (only Phase 0.4 modified it deliberately and was approved separately).

steps.name: Doc Scaffolding
steps.instructions: Update or scaffold documentation for the configured target(s). Uncommitted .md changes on the mapped target path are required.
steps.evidence: TSG written at docs/TSGs/Operations/phase-0.5-source-lift.md covering: what runs, verification chain (G-2/G-5/test parity/manifest round-trip), diagnostic recipes for hash mismatch and each leak severity class and G-5 failures, what NOT to do, and links to SDD trail/inventory/manifest.; Auto-scaffolded 1 doc file(s)

steps.name: Build + Test
steps.instructions: Run build and tests. Save results to build-result.json.
steps.evidence: All 5 gates green: pytest 127 passed (lifted code), validate_inventory G-2 OK at source HEAD 5c25c3e9c7cd (133/29/104), verify_lift G-5 OK (set equality), leak-scan 0 blocking, manifest round-trip OK. build-result.json written.

steps.name: Grade Contract
steps.instructions: Grade each MUST PASS/FAIL item. Save to contract-grade.json.
steps.evidence: 8 MUST PASS / 5 MUST FAIL graded. 6/8 MP pass; MP-5 (docker build) and MP-6 (cluster smoke) explicitly deferred to Phase 0.6 (CI pipeline) and Phase 0.7 (cluster cutover) — scoped accurately. 5/5 MF proven by construction (lift refuses dirty source, refuses unsafe leak findings, never touches source repo, manifest required, test count enforced). Result PROVISIONAL_PASS.

steps.name: Adversarial Verify
steps.instructions: CLI runs rivet verify --scope branch automatically. Triple adversarial required.
